design_plan: rng=42; AIDA pass; hero math=1120px; bento density=grid-auto-flow:dense; label sweep ok; button contrast ok
headline: Super vs Gemini — personal AI agents for real computer work

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs Gemini. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs Gemini

summary: A fair comparison of Super and Google Gemini for people choosing a personal AI agent. Gemini Spark brings agentic automation to macOS and connected apps. Super is built for repeated computer-use workflows, with a reusable computer-use cache that compounds value over time.
